nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: My friend, you look unfamiliar. Is this your first time at Shaolin Temple?

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: How may I help you?

options.text: Brother Linghu! Please teach me Go
I want to learn the essence of Dugu Nine Swords
I want to challenge you again!
What's the connection between Dugu Nine Swords and Go?

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: I'm Linghu Chong, contemplating the relationship between swordsmanship and Go. My master says both are about breaking through techniques.

options.text: Brother Linghu! Please teach me Go
What's the connection between Dugu Nine Swords and Go?

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: The Dugu Nine Swords emphasizes anticipating the opponent's moves - no technique beats all techniques. Go is the same! See through your opponent's intent, understand the board situation, and strike first.

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: I have a technique called 'Dugu Nine Swords: Assessment Chapter' that lets you see the board situation clearly and judge the advantage. But you must defeat me first before I can teach you.

options.text: I'd be honored! Please teach me!

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: Good! Let me see your Go skills. Dugu Nine Swords is about anticipating your opponent. Let's see if you can predict my moves!

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: Please!

options.text: [After Victory] Thank you for the lesson!
[After Defeat] My skills are insufficient, I'll return another day

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: You indeed have great potential! I'll teach you the 'Dugu Nine Swords: Assessment Chapter' now.

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: This technique lets you see the advantage and disadvantage on the board at any time, just like how the Dugu Nine Swords sees through an opponent's flaws. Remember, know yourself and your enemy, and you'll never lose!

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: There's a Hero Guo in Xiangyang City whose Go skills are unfathomable. If you've learned well, go find him for a match.

options.text: I want to challenge you again!
Can you tell me more about Dugu Nine Swords?

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: No worries, victory and defeat are common in battles. Practice more and return another day.

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: Haha, good! Let's have another match!

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: You've mastered the essence of Dugu Nine Swords, keep up the good work!

options.text: I want to challenge you again!

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: There's a Hero Guo in Xiangyang City whose Go skills are unfathomable. If you've learned well, go find him for a match.

options.text: Can you tell me more about the Dugu Nine Swords?

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: You've learned the essence of the Dugu Nine Swords. Now you should go to Xiangyang to find Hero Guo. His Go and martial arts have reached perfection - you'll surely gain insights.

options.text: I'd like to hear more about swordplay

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: You've been to Xiangyang? How are Hero Guo's martial arts? He's truly a top master in the world.

options.text: Hero Guo's martial arts are superb, I learned a lot
I'd like to hear more about your swordplay insights

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: Haha, receiving guidance from Hero Guo makes you a fortunate person. The essence of the Dugu Nine Swords is 'no technique beats all techniques' - I hope you continue to contemplate this.

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: The Dugu Nine Swords has nine forms: General Formula, Breaking Sword Form, Breaking Saber Form, and so on. Its essence is 'no technique' - using no technique to break all techniques, adapting to all changes.

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: Go is the same - don't be constrained by set patterns, adapt to changes, that's the highest level.

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: No worries, learning martial arts and Go must be gradual, can't rush.

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: Since we've met by fate, let's talk another time. I must continue contemplating swordplay.

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: Until we meet again! The martial world is vast, may your Go skills advance and your swordsmanship become divine!

nodes.speaker: Linghu Chong
nodes.text: Take care!
